independence_invariant: Pass C receives source fixtures and explicit equivalence counterparts only; no Pass A or Pass B result is available.
counterpart_use_boundary: Previously reviewed counterparts are source-only equivalence anchors and their verdicts are immutable.

results.rationale: Known program cost and unknown weekly capacity support affordability and completion analysis, but they do not establish borrowing or debt exposure. Spanish adds a feminine student referent while Russian uses a masculine-form referent and EN/ZH remain neutral.
